allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d[k] for k in ['main','module','exports','types'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 data/dnd-assistant.db "SELECT substr\(content, 1, 500\) FROM DocumentChunk WHERE sourceType = 'srd' AND content LIKE '%Challenge%' LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/dnd-assistant.db "SELECT substr\(content, 1, 600\) FROM DocumentChunk WHERE sourceType = 'srd' AND content LIKE '%Goblin%' LIMIT 3;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/dnd-assistant.db "SELECT substr\(content, 1, 600\) FROM DocumentChunk WHERE sourceType = 'srd' AND \(content LIKE '%Dragon%' OR content LIKE '%dragon%'\) AND content LIKE '%CR%' LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/dnd-assistant.db "SELECT substr\(content, 1, 800\) FROM DocumentChunk WHERE sourceType = 'srd' AND content LIKE '%Goblin%' AND content LIKE '%Hit Points%' LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/dnd-assistant.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\), title FROM DocumentChunk dc JOIN Document d ON dc.documentId = d.id WHERE dc.sourceType = 'srd' GROUP BY d.title;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/dnd-assistant.db "SELECT substr\(content, 1, 600\) FROM DocumentChunk WHERE sourceType = 'srd' AND content LIKE '%CR %' AND content LIKE '%HP %' AND content LIKE '%AC %' LIMIT 4;")
